stemHtml: In a gas turbine engine the air flow passages between adjacent axial compressor rotor blades are divergent, but the absolute exit velocity is higher than the absolute entry velocity of the rotor. This is because…

options.a: the gas expands between the blades.
options.b: part of the compressor work delivered to the air is converted into kinetic energy.
options.c: it is a constant temperature process.
options.d: the compressor rotational velocity slows down the air flow.
